world.title: Star Domain Portal
world.lock.clear_map: Clear the previous chân tinh in this star domain first.
world.lock.chapter_gate: Complete the previous chân tinh first.
world.domain.chu_tuoc: Chu Tước Star Domain · orbiting Tu Chân Star
world.domain.ngoai_gioi: Outer Realm · beyond the star domains
chapter.01.fallen_village.name: Wang Family Village
chapter.01.fallen_village.desc: Ruined homeland on Chu Tước Star. Bare fists, humiliation, and the first breath of qi after Heng Yue Sect's rejection.
chapter.02.mist_forest.name: Ghost Spirit Mountain
chapter.02.mist_forest.desc: Mist-shrouded exile after the village fell. Spirit beasts test will, not talent — fortune hides in stone caves.
chapter.03.stone_canyon.name: Zhao Kingdom
chapter.03.stone_canyon.desc: Mortal roads and bandit hills beyond the mountain. Patrol guards and outlaws — dao or death on every pass.
chapter.04.moon_lake.name: Moon Lake Ruins
chapter.04.moon_lake.desc: Ancient seal beneath moonlit water. Corruption stirs where cultivators once bound a greater evil.
chapter.05.burning_desert.name: Fire Burn Country
chapter.05.burning_desert.desc: Scorching sand and demonic cultivators. Endurance tempered by heat — will, not luck, keeps you alive.
chapter.06.thunder_peaks.name: Heavenly Tribulation Pass
chapter.06.thunder_peaks.desc: Clouds gather for heavenly tribulation. Lightning recognizes the stubborn — heaven tests those who reverse fate.
chapter.07.frozen_palace.name: Ice Palace Ruins
chapter.07.frozen_palace.desc: Frozen halls hold echoes of past power. Memory traded for cultivation — cold dao on La Thiên Star.
chapter.08.abyss_rift.name: Outer Battlefield
chapter.08.abyss_rift.desc: The Outer Realm battlefield where cultivators die like grass. Void deepens; the heart's corruption walks beside you.
chapter.09.heavenly_gate.name: Ascension Gate
chapter.09.heavenly_gate.desc: Celestial steps to the ascension threshold. Gate guardians test cultivated hearts — no mercy, only passage.
chapter.10.void_throne.name: Thunder Immortal Hall
chapter.10.void_throne.desc: Lôi Tiên Realm at the road's end. Journey and destination become one — thunder immortals await the obsessed.
map.fallen_village.01.name: Village Outskirts
map.fallen_village.01.desc: Ash and broken walls at the edge of Wang Family Village. Spirit slimes and stray hounds — learn to dodge with empty hands.
map.fallen_village.02.name: Heng Yue Gate
map.fallen_village.02.desc: Outer disciples and gate formations guard the sect trial. Defeat the jade guardian — the ancient sword sleeps here if fate allows.
map.mist_forest.01.name: Haunted Ridge
map.mist_forest.01.desc: Fog-choked ridge on Ghost Spirit Mountain. Mist spirits, ghost wolves, and spirit moths — danger thickens with every step.
map.mist_forest.02.name: Fortune Cave
map.mist_forest.02.desc: Stone cave where a fox spirit once watched from the fog. Shadow elite guards the path to the Ghost Spirit Beast — blade in seal if you missed it at the gate.
map.stone_canyon.01.name: Zhao Road
map.stone_canyon.01.desc: Zhao Kingdom patrol routes ambushed by mountain bandits. Farm here if your combat power still trembles.
map.stone_canyon.02.name: Bandit Mountain
map.stone_canyon.02.desc: Bandit stronghold on the high pass. The chief blocks the road to Moon Lake — ruthless choices ahead.
map.moon_lake.01.name: Moonlit Shore
map.moon_lake.02.name: Seal Ruins
map.burning_desert.01.name: Fire Border
map.burning_desert.02.name: Scorching Sands
map.thunder_peaks.01.name: Tribulation Clouds
map.thunder_peaks.02.name: Heavenly Thunder Altar
map.frozen_palace.01.name: Ice Palace Gate
map.frozen_palace.02.name: Memory Hall
map.abyss_rift.01.name: Battlefield Edge
map.abyss_rift.02.name: Void Chasm
map.heavenly_gate.01.name: Celestial Steps
map.heavenly_gate.02.name: Ascension Trial Gate
map.void_throne.01.name: Path to Lôi Tiên
map.void_throne.02.name: Lôi Tiên Hall
map.test.grove.name: Test Grove
